---
name: Design / component proposal
about: Propose a token, component, or pattern change
title: ''
labels: proposal
assignees: ''
---

**The divergence or gap**
What inconsistency between WP / WooCommerce / Jetpack, or what missing piece, does this
address? Link a real screen if you can.

**Proposed change**
Token, component, or pattern. Be concrete.

**Impact on all three surfaces**
How does this affect WordPress core, WooCommerce, and Jetpack?

> Note: changes to tokens or shared component APIs need an RFC — see `GOVERNANCE.md`.
